# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: three-tier-vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    name: three-tier-app-vpc
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    description: VPC network for three-tier application with auto-created subnets
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: allow-internal-traffic
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
    description: Allow internal communication between all tiers
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.128.0.0/9
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "0-65535"
      - IPProtocol: udp
        ports:
          - "0-65535"
      - IPProtocol: icmp

- name: allow-web-tier-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
    description: Allow HTTP and HTTPS traffic to the web tier
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
    targetTags:
      - web-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "80"
          - "443"

- name: allow-app-tier-from-web
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
    description: Allow traffic from web tier to application tier
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
      - web-tier
    targetTags:
      - app-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "8080"
          - "8443"

- name: allow-db-tier-from-app
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
    description: Allow traffic from application tier to database tier
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceTags:
      - app-tier
    targetTags:
      - db-tier
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "3306"
          - "5432"

- name: allow-ssh-iap
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
    description: Allow SSH access via Identity-Aware Proxy
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - 35.235.240.0/20
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "22"

- name: allow-health-checks
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
    description: Allow Google Cloud health check probes
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    sourceRanges:
      - 130.211.0.0/22
      - 35.191.0.0/16
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "80"
          - "443"
          - "8080"
          - "8443"

outputs:
- name: networkName
  value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.name)
- name: networkSelfLink
  value: $(ref.three-tier-vpc-network.selfLink)
